article.title: Benefits of Blogging for Business - Why Your Small Business Needs a Blog
article.body_markdown:
Businesses that blog get 55% more website visitors and 67% more leads than those that do not.

## Why Blogging Still Matters in 2026

**1. Organic Traffic That Compounds** - Unlike ads, blog posts keep bringing traffic for years. A post published today might not rank for 3 months - but in month 6, it becomes your best traffic source.

**2. Answer Questions Before Customers Ask** - Your blog is your 24/7 salesperson. When a customer Googles a question, your article answers it.

**3. Build Trust Through Expertise** - Publishing consistent, knowledgeable content positions you as an authority. Google rewards EEAT signals.

**4. Feed Your Social Media** - One blog post equals 5 social media posts plus 1 newsletter plus 1 LinkedIn article.

**Starting Takes 60 Seconds** - AI blog writers eliminated the time barrier. Type a keyword, get a publish-ready article.

I built [SEO Spark](https://seospark.net) to make this possible. Free tier: 3 articles.
